name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea (feat)
title: 'feat: <short description>'
labels: feat
---

### 🟢 User Story
**As a [user type], I want [action] so that [benefit].**

### 💡 Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like. 

### 🏗️ Technical Notes
If this requires a breaking change, please note it here for the `BREAKING CHANGE:` footer in the commit.

### ✅ Definition of Done
- [ ] Logic implemented
- [ ] Tests passed
- [ ] Documentation updated
